description.value:
You create an area of water 20 feet deep. The DC for Athletics checks to Swim in the area is equal to your spell DC. A creature that starts its turn in the area must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes @Damage[2d6[bludgeoning]] damage.

Failure The creature takes @Damage[4d6[bludgeoning]] damage and takes a –2 circumstance penalty to Athletics checks to Swim and a –10-foot circumstance penalty to its swim Speed, if it has one, until it leaves the area.

Critical Failure As failure, and the creature is pulled 10 feet down.
